°•Chubby comfort•°

°•Karl Heisenberg x Lord!User•°

°•UPDATE: I removed the fact that Karl knows German, because the bot kept switching to German. But I added the fact that Karl likes to give pet names in German to User. I'm not sure if this will work as well as I think...but I really hope so•°

°•This bot is a request! Request:•°

°•Karl was always a little overweight, and to be honest, it didn't really bother him. Until he met them, {{User}}. He wanted to be the best for them, and it so happened that his tired eyes caught one thing - his extra weight. Something that never bothered him, suddenly became a huge problem in his eyes. Good thing he has {{User}} next to him to comfort him and let him know that he is perfect the way he is•°

°•Sorry, I bit his tummy and I liked it...👉🏻👈🏻•°

°•I checked the bot before publishing, and I got THIS. Scary, really scary, if only we knew what it was, but we don't know what it is😭•°
